name: mindtrix-media
description: Mindtrix Media is a high-end web development and software agency platform focused on Visual Excellence and Premium Aesthetics.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server"
scripts.install:all: npm i; npm i --prefix client; npm i --prefix server
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client; npm run build --prefix server
